ddls:
CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the attribute */,
  "deprecated" TEXT /* Deprecation status of the attribute */,
  "dtd" TEXT /* Document Type Definition (DTD) status of the attribute */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project where the attribute is used */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the attribute (e.g., text, URI, character) */,
  "uri_type" TEXT /* Type of URI (e.g., absolute, relative) */,
  "validation_pattern" TEXT /* Validation pattern for the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the HTML element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the element was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the element (e.g., block, inline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_element_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute-element mapping */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "supported" INTEGER /* Whether the element supports the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the attribute */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Validation message for the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_element_map_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_element_map_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, developer, designer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID the user is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute usage */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the attribute is used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_usage_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_map_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_deprecation" (
  "deprecation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute deprecation */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "deprecated_version" TEXT /* Version when the attribute was deprecated */,
  "replacement" TEXT /* Replacement for the deprecated attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the deprecation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the deprecation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deprecation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_deprecation_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)
